API.title: API Usage
API.description: The Sivraj API lets approved apps and agents request scoped context from a user's Twin. It is designed for permissioned memory access, source-backed retrieval, and integration workflows.

ARCHITECTURE.title: Architecture
ARCHITECTURE.description: Sivraj is a memory-first AI workspace built around a user-owned Twin. The system stores private context, processes source material, and returns permissioned context to first-party and external AI surfaces.

DEVELOPMENT.title: Development
DEVELOPMENT.description: Use this page for local development commands. For the shorter first-run path, see Getting Started.

GETTING_STARTED.title: Getting Started
GETTING_STARTED.description: Sivraj is a memory-first personal AI workspace. Users connect a wallet, create a Twin, add private context, and use that context through chat, tools, and permissioned integrations.

INFRASTRUCTURE.title: Infrastructure
INFRASTRUCTURE.description: Sivraj is built as a TypeScript monorepo with separate apps for the web product, API, workers, command-line tools, and integration surfaces.

INTEGRATIONS.title: External Integrations
INTEGRATIONS.description: Sivraj is designed to make external AI tools more useful without giving them unrestricted access to private memory.

ROADMAP.title: Roadmap
ROADMAP.description: This roadmap describes the public product direction for Sivraj. It avoids internal decision history and implementation notes.

SECURITY.title: Security And Permissions
SECURITY.description: Sivraj stores sensitive long-term context. Security and user control are core product requirements, not optional add-ons.
